intentAndPurpose.intent: User representation — image, icon, or initials. Attention drives the fill (high → bold surface, medium → subtle tint, low → transparent), with t-shirt sizing and multi-accent appearance. The icon/fallback slot supplies colour + size via ComponentSlotIconContext — pass a JDS <Icon>, never a raw SVG with its own fill.

props.name: content
props.description: image (src) → icon/text fallback on load error; icon → icon slot; text → initials from `alt`.

props.name: attention
props.description: high = bold-surface fill, medium = subtle tint, low = transparent. Maps to the surface-resolved paint.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role resolved against the parent <Surface>. Explicit prop wins; 'auto' inherits the nearest <Surface appearance>; root fallback is primary.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL (content="image"). Falls back to icon/text on load error.

props.name: alt
props.description: Accessible name + source for the initials in text variant.

props.name: icon
props.description: ReactNode for the icon variant. MUST be a JDS <Icon> (or any component that reads ComponentSlotIconContext) so it inherits the slot colour + size. A raw <Svg> with a hardcoded fill ignores the slot and renders blank. — [warn] Use <Icon name="…" /> from @oneui/ui-native/icons. The Avatar icon slot provides { sizePx, color } via ComponentSlotIconContext; a bare SVG with its own fill/size will not pick up brand paint and appears invisible.

props.name: fallback
props.description: Custom node shown when the image fails or for icon/text variants. Same slot-context contract as `icon` — prefer a JDS <Icon> or string initials.

props.name: customSize
props.description: Pixel size — only honoured when size="custom".

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. backgroundColor / borderColor are forbidden — attention + appearance drive the fill. — [warn] Don't paint the Avatar via style. Use `attention` + `appearance`; the surface cascade resolves the fill.

content.description: image (src) → icon/text fallback on load error; icon → icon slot; text → initials from `alt`.
